title: Coconut Bhuna Tacos
description: Fermented, juicy, and weeknight-friendly Venezuelan dish featuring coconut flakes in a bhuna sauce for paleo tacos.

ingredients.name: coconut flakes
ingredients.notes: Fermented for enhanced flavor, about 24 hours before cooking

ingredients.name: bhuna sauce base (tomato paste, garlic, onion)

instructions: Heat coconut milk in a pan over medium heat until it comes to a simmer. Add ginger paste and red curry powder, stirring well.
Prepare bhuna sauce by mixing tomato paste, garlic, onion, and seasoning (salt, pepper). Simmer for about 5 minutes or until thickened.
Drain the coconut flakes if fermented, otherwise, soak in water for 2 hours then drain thoroughly. Stir into simmering coconut milk mixture.
Spoon bhuna sauce over tacos, garnish with fresh cilantro and lime wedges. Serve hot.
